title: Kannadi Silaiye Lyrics Iruvar Ullam

ye kannadi silaiye
kannadi silaiye

minsaara mazhaiye
minsaara mazhaiye

naan saaindhaen.

unpaarvai pattadhum

ennnai ne thottdhum
enna naan izhanthaen.

minsaara mazhaiye
minsaara mazhaiye
enakkulle peindhaai
naan saaindhaen.

idhayathin orathil

alangaaram seivathillai

nee enthan perazhagu

idhu kanavil ninjamaa

idhu valiyil sugamaa
enakku puriyavillai.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kannadi Silaiye?

The song explores themes of love, longing, and introspection.

In what context does the song appear in Iruvar Ullam?

The song is featured in a romantic setting, highlighting the emotional connection between the characters.

Who are the artists behind Kannadi Silaiye?

The singer, lyricist, and music director are currently unknown.

When was Iruvar Ullam released?

The movie was released in 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kannadi Silaiye from Iruvar Ullam is a poignant melody that delves into the depths of love and introspection. It captures the essence of a romantic encounter, where the protagonist is mesmerized by their beloved. The lyrics convey a sense of longing and emotional vulnerability, evoking a soothing yet melancholic mood. This song is perfect for moments of reflection and emotional connection.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Kannadi Silaiye from the movie Iruvar Ullam. This song beautifully captures the essence of love and longing, making it a timeless piece. Dive into the soothing rhythms and let the emotions wash over you.
stanzaMeanings: Oh mirror statue, oh mirror statue, you stood in front of me, I saw your face.
Oh electric rain, oh electric rain, you poured inside me, I was overwhelmed.
When your gaze touched me, I forgot my father and mother. When you touched me, I lost myself.
Oh mirror statue, oh mirror statue, you stood in front of me, I saw your face.
Oh electric rain, oh electric rain, you poured inside me, I was overwhelmed.
How did you come to the side of my heart, close enough to touch?
The moon in the sky doesn't decorate itself, like that, you are my beauty on earth.
Is this a dream in my mind or a dream in reality? Is this pain or pleasure? I don't understand.
Oh mirror statue, oh mirror statue, you stood in front of me, I saw your face.
Oh electric rain, oh electric rain, you poured inside me, I was overwhelmed.
I haven't seen God, but I saw your face. When I saw your magical eyes, I fell into a trance.
In this world, I will think of you just once every moment. In my life, I will carry your life every day.
Is this a dream in my mind or a dream in reality? Is this pain or pleasure? I don't understand.
